things.name: Froso Island and Froso Church
things.description: Scenic island in Lake Storsjoen connected by bridge; the 12th-century Froso Church is Jamtland's oldest and Sweden's northernmost runic stone stands in the churchyard

things.name: Jamtli Museum
things.description: Outstanding open-air and indoor museum celebrating Jamtland history; costumed interpreters bring the 18th and 19th centuries to life across reconstructed farm buildings and workshops

things.name: Lake Storsjoen and the Storsjoodjuret Monster
things.description: Sweden's fifth largest lake and legendary home of the Storsjoodjuret (Great Lake Monster); a magnificent body of water offering boat trips, fishing and winter ice experiences

things.name: Ostersund Town Square (Stortorget)
things.description: Ostersund's attractive main square with the City Hall, restaurants and market; the compact city centre is exceptionally lively given its northern location

things.name: Winter Biathlon at Ostersund Arena
things.description: World-class biathlon venue and one of the regular stops on the IBU World Cup circuit; ski trails open to the public, and biathlon shooting range experiences in winter

things.name: Are Ski Resort (day trip)
things.description: Scandinavia's largest ski resort just 100km west of Ostersund; host of the 2019 Alpine Ski World Championships with slopes for all abilities and a lively resort village

things.name: Jamt and Harjedalen County Museum
things.description: Comprehensive museum inside Jamtli exploring the region's Sami heritage, medieval history and the remarkable Overhogdal tapestries from around 1000 AD

things.name: Froso Zoo
things.description: Scandinavia's northernmost zoo on Froso Island with Nordic animals including moose, reindeer, lynx and wolverine in naturalistic enclosures; a family favourite

things.name: Sami Cultural Heritage
things.description: Ostersund is the gateway to the Sami heartlands; the Aajege centre and local exhibitions explore the indigenous Sami people's reindeer herding culture, joik music and craft traditions

things.name: Jamtkraft Arena
things.description: Home of Ostersunds FK with 8,500 capacity; the club's extraordinary rise from Division 4 to the Allsvenskan and UEFA Europa League round of 32 in 2017-18 is Swedish football's greatest story
